name: cryptolab-backend

scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch src --ext ts --exec ts-node src/index.ts

description: Features: - TypeScript + Express 5 - JWT auth (access token only) - Mongoose models + Joi validation - Paper trading: buy/sell, positions, trades, portfolio summary - Finnhub WebSocket ingestion:   - Broadcasts live ticks to connected clients   - Persists latest price per symbol to Mongo (backup source) - Swagger docs at /docs - Health endpoint at /health
